name: DrawerShell
usage_hint: Multi-mode container island that lazily hydrates child islands on open. Used as the Cart V2 shell or any deferred-content drawer/modal/sheet.
when_to_use: Wrap CartLines, CartSummary, CartCheckoutButton, CartProgressBar, CartDiscountInput inside DrawerShell for lazy-loaded cart UI. Also usable for any deferred sidebar, bottom sheet, or modal pattern.
when_not_to_use: Do not use for always-visible content. Not a replacement for inline sections. If content must be visible on page load, use regular islands.
anti_patterns: Nesting DrawerShell inside another DrawerShell (recursive containers not supported)
Omitting data-island-container attribute (children would hydrate immediately, defeating lazy loading)
Using without any child islands (empty shell serves no purpose)
